recommendations.title: Troublemakers
recommendations.overview: Two brothers who hate themselves are going to spend Christmas with their mother. She tries to get them together.

recommendations.title: Lucky Luke
recommendations.overview: Fearless gunslinger, Lucky Luke, is ordered by the President to bring peace to Daisy Town.

recommendations.title: Last of the Renegades
recommendations.overview: Forester, a ruthless oil baron, wants to create a war between the native American tribes and the white men. Old Shatterhand, Winnetou and their sidekick Castlepool try to prevent this.

recommendations.title: Blazing Saddles
recommendations.overview: A town—where everyone seems to be named Johnson—stands in the way of the railroad. In order to grab their land, robber baron Hedley Lamarr sends his henchmen to make life in the town unbearable. After the sheriff is killed, the town demands a new she

recommendations.title: A Fistful of Dollars
recommendations.overview: The Man With No Name enters the Mexican village of San Miguel in the midst of a power struggle among the three Rojo brothers and sheriff John Baxter. When a regiment of Mexican soldiers bearing gold intended to pay for new weapons is waylaid by the R

recommendations.title: Double Trouble
recommendations.overview: A stuntman and a saxophonist stand in for two billionaires threatened by killers.

recommendations.title: Lucky Luke: The Ballad of the Daltons
recommendations.overview: The Dalton brothers are to receive their dead uncle's fortune if they eliminate the judge and jury responsible for his execution. And to accomplish this task, they must enlist the help of Lucky Luke.
recommendations.director: Henri Gruel, Pierre Watrin, Morris, René Goscinny

recommendations.title: Spirit Untamed
recommendations.overview: Lucky Prescott's life is changed forever when she moves from her home in the city to a small frontier town and befriends a wild mustang named Spirit.

recommendations.title: Daisy Town
recommendations.overview: When the members of a caravan of pioneers find a daisy growing in the middle of the desert they decide to stop there and to build their town on this very spot. Houses soon spring up like mushrooms, immediately followed by a bank, a saloon, a prison,

recommendations.title: Rio Bravo
recommendations.overview: A small-town sheriff in the American West enlists the help of a disabled man, a drunk, and a young gunfighter in his efforts to hold in jail the brother of the local bad guy.
